title: WolvenTweaks
description: This is a tweak mod for my curseforge modpack Wolven
body: This is a tweaker mod for Wolven, just like how RLcraft has tweaker mods, Wolven has tweaker mods, Wolven Tweaks adds sharp stones, jungle spiders, a custom painting, clay dirt, etc! There are still bugs tho. This mod was made in MCreator and is my first mod. This mod requires no tree punching as sharp stones need loose stones in order to be crafted. The mod contains some harder crafting, a new companion crafted from a bone and 8 pieces of wool, along with the jungle spider, this will be removed temporarily since it isn't compatible with nyffs spiders or FA spiders (yet).
